case_title: BREAK THRU PRODUCTIONS INC. VS CALIBUR RECORDS INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY BREAK THRU PRODUCTIONS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CALIBUR RECORDS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALIBUR RECORDS INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BREAK THRU PRODUCTIONS INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIBUR RECORDS INC. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,539.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CALIBUR RECORDS INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CALIBUR RECORDS INC.
W R I T TO LA COUNTY RETURNED PARTIALLY SATISFIED FOR $233.69.
